person.name: Sir Nichol de Rutherford II
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Sir Nicol of Rutherfurd swore fealty to the English King Edward I at Montrose 11 July 1296,' but, according to Blind Harry,  he then joined Sir William "Wallace in Ettrick Forest with sixty followers, in consequence of which his lands of Dodington Mill in Northumberland were seized by the English King, he being a rebel, in 1296." He married a lady named Marjorie, who is said to have been a near relative of Marion Braidfute of Lamington, Wallace's wife, and he was probably the grandfather of

1. Eva, and

2. Marjory, styled heirs of 'Monsire Nichol de Rother-
forde, chivaler Descose,' their grandfather.

sourceList.title: The Scots peerage; founded on Wood's edition of Sir Robert Douglas's peerage of Scotland; containing an historical and genealogical account of the nobility of that kingdom by Paul, James Balfour, Sir, 1846-1931
The Rutherfurds of that Ilk, and their cadets by Rutherfurd, Family of, of Rutherfurd; Cockburn-Hood, Thomas H, 1884

zh.West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭皮布萊爾韋斯特 林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nichol de Rutherford II於大約1235年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾韋斯特 林頓時，他的父親Sir Nichol de Rutherford33歲，母親Euphemia De Lisle37歲。他和Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1300年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰皮布萊爾韋斯特 林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nichol de Rutherford II于大约1235年出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾韋斯特 林頓时，他的父亲Sir Nichol de Rutherford33岁，母亲Euphemia De Lisle37岁。他和Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1300年在英国苏格兰洛包爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rutherford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Rutherford in Maxton (Roxburghshire), apparently named with Old English hrīther, hrȳther ‘ox’ + ford ‘ford’, though a British Celtic origin of the type ro- ‘great’ + dubr- ‘water, river’ is also possible for the first element. Places named Rutherford in West Linton (West Lothian) and Barningham (North Yorkshire) are less likely sources of the name.

variants.name: Reliford
meanings: Altered form of English   Rutherford  . Its bearers are mainly African Americans. Compare   Relaford  ,   Releford  ,   Relford  .

nameMeanings.name: Nichol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a common medieval vernacular form of   Nicholas .  In modern use, except in Scotland where it is still bestowed mainly on boys, it is found more frequently as a girl's name, possibly being taken as a variant of   Nicole .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nichol de Rutherford II was born about 1235, in West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, was 33 and his mother, Euphemia De Lisle, was 37. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON. He died about 1300, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland: West Linton, Valle de Twede, Écosse
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nichol de Rutherford II est né environ 1235, à West Linton, Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Euphemia De Lisle, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nichol de Rutherford II um 1235 in West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nichol de Rutherford 33 und seine Mutter Euphemia De Lisle 37. Er hatte mit Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1300 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nichol de Rutherford II è nato il circa 1235 nel West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Euphemia De Lisle, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON. Morì circa 1300, nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nichol de Rutherford IIが約1235年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアウエスト リントンで生まれた時，父Sir Nichol de Rutherfordは33歳，母Euphemia De Lisleは37歳であった。彼はMarjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTONとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1300年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nichol de Rutherford II(이)가 대략 1235년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 웨스트 린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nichol de Rutherford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia De Lisle(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nichol de Rutherford II nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Euphemia De Lisle, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nichol de Rutherford II родился около 1235 г. в местности вест линтон, пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Nichol de Rutherford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Euphemia De Lisle, 37. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Marjorie BRAIDFUTE OF LAMINGTON. Murió aproximadamente 1300, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
